name: LEMAITRE VASCULAR INC
business: LeMaitre Vascular is a global provider of medical devices and human tissue cryopreservation services used in the treatment of peripheral vascular disease, end-stage renal disease, and cardiovascular disease. The company sells primarily to vascular surgeons, and to a lesser degree to cardiac surgeons, general surgeons, and neurosurgeons. Approximately 95% of net sales are generated through a direct-to-hospital sales force.

exposures.sentence: We are a global provider of medical devices and human tissue cryopreservation services largely used in the treatment of peripheral vascular disease, end-stage renal disease, and cardiovascular disease.

catalysts.event: CE mark received for Artegraft and began marketing in EU
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we received the CE mark and began marketing the device in the EU.

catalysts.event: Expect to begin marketing allografts in Germany
catalysts.sentence: We expect to begin marketing allografts in Germany in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Submitted XenoSure vascular indication application to NMPA
catalysts.sentence: We submitted the vascular indication application to the Chinese National Medical Products Administration, or NMPA, in December 2025, and we anticipate a review process that may conclude in approximately 2 years.

catalysts.event: Expect to reapply for HPRA distribution authorization and commence distribution in Ireland
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to establishing a distribution facility in Ireland in 2025, we expect to reapply for distribution authorization with Ireland’s Health Products Regulatory Authority (HPRA) in the first half of 2026 and anticipate commencing distribution by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Allograft tissue processing transition to Burlington expected substantially complete
catalysts.sentence: This transition is expected to be substantially complete by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Expect to receive remaining UKCA marks
catalysts.sentence: We expect to receive the remaining UKCA marks in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expect to apply for AATB accreditation at Burlington facility
catalysts.sentence: We expect to apply for AATB accreditation at our Burlington facility in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Annual worldwide market for peripheral vascular devices exceeds $9 billion, with addressable market for the company's products approximately $1 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that the annual worldwide market for peripheral vascular devices exceeds $9 billion, within which we estimate that the market for our products is approximately $1 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Peripheral vascular disease affects more than 200 million people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that peripheral vascular disease affects more than 200 million people worldwide.
